expectations.text: Output uses the closeout summary format
expectations.evidence: Header reads '## Closeout Summary' and follows Format 3 fields.

expectations.text: Task Scope explicitly states 'No task was worked on.' (or equivalent — 'No bead was worked on.')
expectations.evidence: 'Task Scope: No task was worked on.'

expectations.text: Output does NOT invent a task ID, ticket number, or fictional bead reference
expectations.evidence: No invented IDs; Task Scope states no task.

expectations.text: Closeout Outcome describes the typo fix and that it merged directly to main
expectations.evidence: 'Fixed a one-line typo in an admin UI button label: pubish → publish.' and 'Integration target reached: main (merged directly to main; allowed for trivial typo fixes per team convention)'.

expectations.text: Evidence section is concrete (lint passed, typecheck passed, unit tests passing, commit 4d5e6f7, pushed, branch deleted)
expectations.evidence: Evidence lists Lint passed, Typecheck passed, Unit tests passing, Commit 4d5e6f7, Push yes, Branch merged to main and deleted.

expectations.text: Behavioral Impact notes the user-visible button label change (pubish → publish)
Risks/Gaps states there are no known remaining gaps (or equivalent)
Output does not cite this skill by name
expectations.evidence: No mention of the skill name.
